prompt: Has recibido una factura de proveedor (ver PDF adjunto). Registra la factura en Tripletex. Crea el proveedor si no existe. Usa la cuenta de gastos correcta y el IVA de entrada.

parsed_task.raw_prompt: Has recibido una factura de proveedor (ver PDF adjunto). Registra la factura en Tripletex. Crea el proveedor si no existe. Usa la cuenta de gastos correcta y el IVA de entrada.
_file_contents:
[File: files/leverandorfaktura_es_02.pdf]
Luna SL
Org.nr: 882423107
Torggata 80, 0182 Oslo
FAKTURA
Fakturanummer: INV-2026-1307
Fakturadato: 13.05.2026
Forfallsdato: 12.06.2026
Til: Ditt firma
Beskrivelse Belop

MVA 25%: 10587 kr
Totalt: 52937 kr
Konto: 6300

result:
Perfect! I have successfully registered the supplier invoice from Luna SL in Tripletex. Here's what was accomplished:

## Summary

✅ **Created new supplier**: Luna SL (ID: 108395801)
- Organization number: 882423107
- Address: Torggata 80, 0182 Oslo
- Supplier number: 20001

✅ **Registered supplier invoice**: Created voucher #1-2026 (ID: 609093287)
- Invoice number: INV-2026-1307
- Invoice date: 2026-05-13
- Description: Network services (Nettverkstjenester)
- Amount: 52,937 kr (42,350 kr + 10,587 kr VAT)

✅ **Correct accounting treatment**:
- **Expense account 6300** (Leie lokale): 52,937 kr gross amount
- **VAT account 2700** (system-generated): 10,587 kr incoming VAT (25% - vatType id=1)
- **Accounts payable 2400**: -52,937 kr liability to supplier

The invoice has been properly recorded with incoming VAT (fradrag inngående avgift) at 25% rate, and the system automatically created the necessary VAT posting. The supplier Luna SL is now registered and the invoice is ready for payment processing.
